previous_plan.notes: Wave 5 COMPLETE — D1-P3 + D4-lite + D6, 1548 tests

design_decisions.cli_architecture: Maintain embedded engine (no HTTP client to server)
design_decisions.e2e_test_strategy: Mock HTTP layer via axum::TestServer (no real port binding)
design_decisions.docker_frontend: Keep compose separation (Nginx/Caddy as separate service)
design_decisions.unwrap_governance: Fix only critical paths, keep test code unwraps

notes: Wave 6 COMPLETE — production hardening + E2E testing + config/deploy. 15/15 tasks done. 1594 tests passing.
